title: PictureSign
description: Use signs to display pictures from the web completely client-side!
body:
**PictureSign** is a _client-side_ mod that allows players to display custom images, GIFs, audios and even videos in their worlds using just signs. The pictures can be freely rescaled, relocated and rotated.

**Wanna try it?** Have a look at the new [wiki](https://www.midnightdust.eu/wiki/picturesign/) for more information.
